meaning: n. 投票选举,投票表决,轮流检测,联接到另一主机查看电子信件或新闻
examples: Polling has been heavy since 8 a.m.
He walked to the local polling place to cast his vote.
There has been a busy start to polling in today's local elections.
But Duffy says conflicting polling data makes it unclear who Barkley is hurting the most.
More were being delivered to polling stations but the snafu was not expected to affect voting.
